page_metadata.biotools__summary: Collection of shRNA dropout signatures profiles, covering ~16000 human genes, and derived from more than 70 Pancreatic, Ovarian and Breast human cancer cell-lines using a microarray detection platform.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Collection of shRNA dropout signatures profiles, covering ~16000 human genes, and derived from more than 70 Pancreatic, Ovarian and Breast human cancer cell-lines using a microarray detection platform.
